attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT FACT.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT           ,
FACT.BK_METRIC_ID_INT              ,
FACT.BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID            ,
RV.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,
FACT.BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR          ,
FACT.BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR          ,
FACT.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR          ,
FACT.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR          ,
FACT.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR          ,
FACT.BK_HIERARCHY_ID_INT           ,
FACT.TIME_PERIOD_CD                ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR         ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_2_DESCR         ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_3_DESCR         ,
CASE WHEN (FACT.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT=1 AND (FACT.BK_METRIC_ID_INT = 4 or FACT.BK_METRIC_ID_INT=7) )
THEN CASE  
WHEN (((FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT - FACT4.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT)/NULLIFZERO(FACT4.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT))*100 ) is not null THEN
CAST (TRIM(((FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT - FACT4.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT)/NULLIFZERO(FACT4.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT))*100   ) as VARCHAR(30))|| ' %'
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END
ELSE FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_4_DESCR 
END  MEASURE_VALUE_4_DESCR        ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_5_DESCR         ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_6_DESCR         ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_7_DESCR         ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_8_DESCR         ,
FACT.MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_DESCR    ,
FACT.MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_DESCR ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT           ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_2_AMT           ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_3_AMT           ,
CASE WHEN ((FACT.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT=1) AND (FACT.BK_METRIC_ID_INT = 4 or FACT.BK_METRIC_ID_INT=7)) 
THEN ((FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT - FACT4.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT)/NULLIFZERO(FACT4.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT))*100   
ELSE FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_4_AMT     END AS F_MEASURE_VALUE_4_AMT,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_5_AMT           ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_6_AMT           ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_7_AMT           ,
FACT.MEASURE_VALUE_8_AMT           ,
FACT.MEASURE_TARGET_VALUE_AMT      ,
FACT.MEASURE_TOLERANCE_VALUE_AMT   ,
FACT.MEASURE_BENCHMARK_CD          ,
FACT.SORT_ORDER_POSITION_INT       ,
FACT.LAST_UPDATE_DTM               ,
FACT.METRIC_ACTIVE_FLG             ,
FACT.BATCH_ID                      ,
FACT1.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT  AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_1_AMT  ,
FACT2.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_2_AMT  ,
FACT3.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_3_AMT  ,
FACT4.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_4_AMT  ,
FACT5.MEASURE_VALUE_1_AMT AS MEASURE_VALUE_PREV_QTR_5_AMT  ,
FACT.ACTION_PLAN_CMT               ,
FACT.KEY_DRIVER_CMT                ,
COALESCE(FACT1.MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_1_AMT_DESCR,
COALESCE(FACT2.MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_2_AMT_DESCR,
COALESCE(FACT3.MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_3_AMT_DESCR,
COALESCE(FACT4.MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_4_AMT_DESCR,
COALESCE(FACT5.MEASURE_VALUE_1_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') AS MSR_VAL_PREV_QTR_5_AMT_DESCR,
FACT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
FACT.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
FACT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
FACT.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_PMM_DSHBRD_PRESTAGING_AUTD FACT
	LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RV
	                ON RV.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=FACT.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME               
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RV_PREV1
	                ON RV.fiscal_qtr_age+1=RV_PREV1.fiscal_qtr_age
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PMM_DSHBRD_PRESTAGING_AUTD   FACT1
	                  ON RV_PREV1.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=FACT1.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME  
					  AND FACT.BK_METRIC_ID_INT=FACT1.BK_METRIC_ID_INT   
					  AND FACT.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT=FACT1.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT 
					  AND FACT.BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID=FACT1.BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID 
					  AND COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR, 'UNKNOWN')= COALESCE(FACT1.BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR, 'UNKNOWN')  
					  AND   COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR, 'UNKNOWN') = COALESCE(FACT1.BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR, 'UNKNOWN')   
					  AND   COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR, 'UNKNOWN') = COALESCE(FACT1.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR, 'UNKNOWN')   
					  AND  COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR, 'UNKNOWN') = COALESCE(FACT1.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR, 'UNKNOWN') 	
                     AND  COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR, 'UNKNOWN') = COALESCE(FACT1.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR, 'UNKNOWN')	
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RV_PREV2
	                ON RV.fiscal_qtr_age+2=RV_PREV2.fiscal_qtr_age	
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PMM_DSHBRD_PRESTAGING_AUTD   FACT2
	                  ON RV_PREV2.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=FACT2.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME  
					 AND FACT.BK_METRIC_ID_INT=FACT2.BK_METRIC_ID_INT   
					 AND FACT.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT=FACT2.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT 
					 AND FACT.BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID=FACT2.BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID 
					 AND COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR, '')= COALESCE(FACT2.BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR, '')  
					  AND   COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT2.BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR, '')   
					  AND   COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT2.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR, '')   
					  AND  COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT2.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR, '') 	
                      AND  COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT2.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR, '') 	
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RV_PREV3
	                ON RV.fiscal_qtr_age+3=RV_PREV3.fiscal_qtr_age
	                  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PMM_DSHBRD_PRESTAGING_AUTD   FACT3	
                      ON RV_PREV3.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=FACT3.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME  
					 AND FACT.BK_METRIC_ID_INT=FACT3.BK_METRIC_ID_INT   
					   AND FACT.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT=FACT3.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT 
					   AND FACT.BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID=FACT3.BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID 
					   AND COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR, '')= COALESCE(FACT3.BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR, '')  
					  AND   COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT3.BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR, '')   
					  AND   COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT3.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR, '')   
					  AND  COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT3.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR, '') 	
                      AND  COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT3.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR, '') 		
                  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RV_PREV4
	                ON RV.fiscal_qtr_age+4=RV_PREV4.fiscal_qtr_age
	                  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PMM_DSHBRD_PRESTAGING_AUTD   FACT4
					    ON RV_PREV4.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=FACT4.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME  
					 AND FACT.BK_METRIC_ID_INT=FACT4.BK_METRIC_ID_INT   
					 AND FACT.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT=FACT4.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT 
					 AND FACT.BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID=FACT4.BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID 
					 AND COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR, '')= COALESCE(FACT4.BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR, '')  
					  AND   COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT4.BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR, '')   
					  AND   COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT4.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR, '')   
					  AND  COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT4.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR, '') 	
                      AND  COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT4.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR, '') 	       
                  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RV_PREV5
	                ON RV.fiscal_qtr_age+5=RV_PREV5.fiscal_qtr_age
	                  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PMM_DSHBRD_PRESTAGING_AUTD   FACT5					  
  ON RV_PREV5.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=FACT5.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME  
					 AND FACT.BK_METRIC_ID_INT=FACT5.BK_METRIC_ID_INT   
					   AND FACT.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT=FACT5.BK_SCORECARD_ID_INT 
					   AND FACT.BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID=FACT5.BK_METRIC_CLASS_ID 
					 AND  COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR, '')= COALESCE(FACT5.BK_DIMENSION_1_DESCR, '')  
					  AND   COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT5.BK_DIMENSION_2_DESCR, '')   
					  AND   COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT5.BK_DIMENSION_3_DESCR, '')   
					  AND  COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT5.BK_DIMENSION_4_DESCR, '') 	
                      AND  COALESCE(FACT.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR, '') = COALESCE(FACT5.BK_DIMENSION_5_DESCR, '')
